# motoko.de

> Motorcycle rental, guided tours, and custom parts — based in Frankfurt am Main, Germany.

## About

Motoko GmbH is a premium motorcycle rental company based in Frankfurt am Main, Germany. We offer a curated fleet of ten motorcycles from eight manufacturers, guided and self-guided tours through Germany's most scenic riding regions, and comprehensive insurance on every rental.

## Fleet

We rent the following motorcycles (all prices per day, insurance included):

- Honda GL Goldwing Valkyrie (2014) — Touring, 1832cc Flat-6, 115 PS — €200/day
- BMW R 1200 GS (2010) — Adventure, 1170cc Boxer Twin, 109 PS — €100/day
- BMW K 1300 R (2009) — Naked, 1293cc Inline-4, 170 PS — €130/day
- Buell XB12 SCG (2006) — Naked, 1202cc V-Twin, 101 PS — €130/day
- Kawasaki Zephyr 1100 (1993) — Classic, 1062cc Inline-4, 91 PS — €70/day
- Ducati 900 SS (1997) — Supersport, 904cc L-Twin, 76 PS — €130/day
- Husqvarna Vitpilen 701 (2020) — Naked, 693cc Single, 74 PS — €100/day
- Triumph Speed Triple (2006) — Naked, 1050cc Triple, 129 PS — €100/day
- Triumph Rocket 3R (2020) — Cruiser, 2458cc Triple, 165 PS — €220/day
- Harley-Davidson FLH (2001) — Touring, 1449cc V-Twin, 63 PS — €150/day

Discounts: 10% off for 3-day rentals, 20% off for 7+ day rentals.

## Tours

We offer tours from Frankfurt through:

- Taunus (1 day, 180 km, easy)
- Odenwald (1 day, 220 km, moderate)
- Rhine & Moselle (2 days, 420 km, moderate)
- Eifel & Nürburgring (2 days, 480 km, challenging)
- Black Forest (3 days, 750 km, moderate)
- Alpine Border Tour (7 days, 2200 km, challenging)

## Requirements

- Valid Class A motorcycle license (A2 for some bikes)
- Minimum age: 21 (25 for bikes over 100 PS)
- Security deposit: €500–€1,500
- Free cancellation up to 48 hours before rental start

## Booking

Book via RIBE (ribeme.com) or contact us directly via WhatsApp.

## Location

Pickup and return in Frankfurt am Main, Germany.
10 minutes from Frankfurt Hauptbahnhof, 25 minutes from Frankfurt Airport.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.motoko.de
- Booking: https://www.ribeme.com
- Instagram: @motoko.ffm
